targets.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iceberg.retail.fraud_signals WHERE fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM iceberg.retail.payments p JOIN iceberg.retail.fraud_signals f ON p.order_id = f.order_id WHERE f.fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR AND f.action_taken='block'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.order_id) FILTER (WHERE f.fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) FILTER (WHERE o.order_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR), 0) FROM iceberg.retail.orders o LEFT JOIN iceberg.retail.fraud_signals f ON o.order_id = f.order_id
SELECT AVG(fraud_score) FROM iceberg.retail.fraud_signals WHERE fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', fraud_timestamp) AS hour, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fraud_score >= 0.8) AS high, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fraud_score >= 0.5 AND fraud_score < 0.8) AS medium, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fraud_score < 0.5) AS low FROM iceberg.retail.fraud_signals WHERE fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
SELECT fraud_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM iceberg.retail.fraud_signals WHERE fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY fraud_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT WIDTH_BUCKET(fraud_score, 0, 1, 10) AS bucket, COUNT(*) FROM iceberg.retail.fraud_signals WHERE fraud_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
